zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Gillespic Campbell 1st Lord Of Menstrie 9th Knight Of Lochow於1199年出生在蘇格蘭阿吉爾洛霍時，他的父親Gillecholum Ó Duibhne Campbell - First Lord of Lochowe192歲，母親Cambus Bellus Beauchamp Heiress of Beauchamp178歲。他於1229年與Errick MacDhonnchad在蘇格蘭阿吉爾洛霍結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他在蘇格蘭阿吉爾洛霍被列為lord of lochawe。他去世於1280年在蘇格蘭可拉可曼南史爾梅斯特利享年81歲，埋葬在蘇格蘭阿吉爾吉爾可雷南。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Gillespic Campbell 1st Lord Of Menstrie 9th Knight Of Lochow于1199年出生在苏格兰阿吉爾洛霍时，他的父亲Gillecholum Ó Duibhne Campbell - First Lord of Lochowe192岁，母亲Cambus Bellus Beauchamp Heiress of Beauchamp178岁。他于1229年与Errick MacDhonnchad在苏格兰阿吉爾洛霍结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他在苏格兰阿吉爾洛霍被列为lord of lochawe。他去世于1280年在苏格兰可拉可曼南史爾梅斯特利享年81岁，埋葬在苏格兰阿吉爾吉爾可雷南。

nameMeanings.name: Campbell
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: nickname from Gaelic cam ‘crooked, bent’ + beul ‘mouth’. As a result of folk etymology, the surname was often represented in Latin documents as de bello campo ‘of the fair field’, which led to the name sometimes being ‘translated’ into Anglo-Norman French as Beauchamp .
Irish (North Armagh): adopted for Gaelic Mac Cathmhaoil ‘son of Cathmhaol’ (literally ‘battle chief’): see Caulfield and Cowell .
English: variant of   Camel  , under the influence of the Scottish name (see 1 above).

variants.name: Campell
meanings: Scottish (Lanarkshire) and English: variant of   Campbell   (see also   Camel  ).

variants.name: Beauchamp
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Antoine, Jacques, Yves, Andre, Armand, Emile, Fernand, Marcel, Marthe, Remi, Alcide, Camille.

English (of Norman origin) and French: habitational name from any of several places in France, for example in Manche and Somme, that are named with Old French beu, bel ‘fair, lovely’ + champ(s) ‘field, plain’ (from Latin bello campo ‘beautiful field’). In English the surname is generally pronounced Beecham . Compare Bushaw .
English: in some cases, an Anglo-Norman French adaptation of Scottish Campbell , by translation into French of the folk etymology de campo bello ‘from the fair field’.

variants.name: Camel
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Andre, Napoleon, Patrice.

English (of Norman origin) and French: nickname from Norman French came(i)l ‘camel’ (from Latin camelus, classical Greek kamēlos), possibly denoting a clumsy person or someone with long legs. It may also be a topographic or habitational name referring to a house with a sign depicting a camel (although surnames derived from house and inn signs are rare in English); compare 5 below.
English: possibly a habitational name from Queen Camel and West Camel in Somerset, early recorded as Camel(le), possibly a Celtic name from canto- ‘border, district’ and mēl ‘bare hill’.

nameMeanings.name: Gillespic
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Anglicized form of Gaelic Gille Easbaig ‘bishop's servant’. Gille Easbaig Cambeul was the founder of Clan Campbell.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Gillespic Campbell 1st Lord Of Menstrie 9th Knight Of Lochow was born in 1199, in Lochawe, Argyll, Scotland, his father, Gillecholum Ó Duibhne Campbell - First Lord of Lochowe, was 192 and his mother, Cambus Bellus Beauchamp Heiress of Beauchamp, was 178. He married Errick MacDhonnchad in 1229, in Lochawe, Argyll, Scotland. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 3 daughters. His occupation is listed as lord of lochawe in Lochawe, Argyll, Scotland. He died in 1280, in Menstrie, Clackmannanshire, Scotland, at the age of 81, and was buried in Kilchrenan, Argyll, Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Gillespic Campbell 1st Lord Of Menstrie 9th Knight Of Lochow est né en 1199, à Lochawe, Argyll, Écosse, son père, Gillecholum Ó Duibhne Campbell - First Lord of Lochowe, avait 192 ans et sa mère, Cambus Bellus Beauchamp Heiress of Beauchamp, avait 178 ans. Il a épousé Errick MacDhonnchad en 1229, à Lochawe, Argyll, Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 3 filles. Sa profession de son indiquée est lord of lochawe à Lochawe, Argyll, Écosse. Il est décédé en 1280, à Menstrie, Clackmannanshire, Écosse, à l’âge de 81 ans, et a été enterré à Kilchrenan, Argyll, Écosse.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Gillespic Campbell 1st Lord Of Menstrie 9th Knight Of Lochow 1199 in Lochawe, Argyll, Scotland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Gillecholum Ó Duibhne Campbell - First Lord of Lochowe 192 und seine Mutter Cambus Bellus Beauchamp Heiress of Beauchamp 178. Er hat 1229 in Lochawe, Argyll, Scotland Errick MacDhonnchad geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 3 Töchter. sein Beruf ist als lord of lochawe in Lochawe, Argyll, Scotland aufgeführt. Er starb 1280 im Alter von 81 Jahren in Menstrie, Clackmannanshire, Scotland und wurde in Kilchrenan, Argyll, Scotland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Gillespic Campbell 1st Lord Of Menstrie 9th Knight Of Lochow è nato il nel 1199 nel Lochawe, Argyll, Scotland, il suo padre, Gillecholum Ó Duibhne Campbell - First Lord of Lochowe, aveva 192 anni e il suo madre, Cambus Bellus Beauchamp Heiress of Beauchamp, aveva 178 anni. Lui sposato Errick MacDhonnchad nel 1229, nel Lochawe, Argyll, Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 3 figlie. La sua occupazione è indicata come lord of lochawe nel Lochawe, Argyll, Scotland. Morì nel 1280, nel Menstrie, Clackmannanshire, Scotland, all'età di 81 anni, e fu sepolto a Kilchrenan, Argyll, Scotland.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Gillespic Campbell 1st Lord Of Menstrie 9th Knight Of Lochowが1199年にスコットランドアルグイルロチャウで生まれた時，父Gillecholum Ó Duibhne Campbell - First Lord of Lochoweは192歳，母Cambus Bellus Beauchamp Heiress of Beauchampは178歳であった。1229年にスコットランドアルグイルロチャウでErrick MacDhonnchadと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。スコットランドアルグイルロチャウでの職業はlord of lochaweと記録されている。彼は1280年にスコットランドクラクマナンシュアイアメンストリーで81歳で死去し，スコットランドアルグイルキルチレナンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Gillespic Campbell 1st Lord Of Menstrie 9th Knight Of Lochow(이)가 1199년 스컷랜드 아그이 럭아베에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Gillecholum Ó Duibhne Campbell - First Lord of Lochowe(은)는 192세였고, 그의 어머니 Cambus Bellus Beauchamp Heiress of Beauchamp(은)는 178세였다. 그는 1229년 스컷랜드 아그이 럭아베에서 Errick MacDhonnchad(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그의 직업은 스컷랜드 아그이 럭아베에서 lord of lochawe이었다. 그는 1280년 스컷랜드 클랙먼아실르 멘스트리에서 81세의 나이로 사망했으며 스컷랜드 아그이 킬크리난에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Gillespic Campbell 1st Lord Of Menstrie 9th Knight Of Lochow nasceu em 1199, em Lochawe, Argyll, Scotland, seu pai, Gillecholum Ó Duibhne Campbell - First Lord of Lochowe, tinha 192 anos e sua mãe, Cambus Bellus Beauchamp Heiress of Beauchamp, tinha 178 anos. Ele casou-se com Errick MacDhonnchad em 1229, em Lochawe, Argyll, Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 3 filhas. Sua profissão aparece como lord of lochawe em Lochawe, Argyll, Scotland. Ele faleceu em 1280, em Menstrie, Clackmannanshire, Scotland, com 81 anos, e foi sepultado em Kilchrenan, Argyll, Scotland.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Gillespic Campbell 1st Lord Of Menstrie 9th Knight Of Lochow родился в 1199 г. в местности лочав, аргилл, Шотландия, его отцу по имени Gillecholum Ó Duibhne Campbell - First Lord of Lochowe было 192 года, а матери, которую звали Cambus Bellus Beauchamp Heiress of Beauchamp, 178. Он женился на женщине по имени Errick MacDhonnchad в 1229 г. в местности лочав, аргилл, Шотландия. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 3 дочери.  Он работал по профессии lord of lochawe в местности лочав, аргилл, Шотландия. Он умер в 1280 г. в местности менстри, клаккманнаньшир, Шотландия в возрасте 81 год и был похоронен в местности килчренан, аргилл, Шотландия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Gillespic Campbell 1st Lord Of Menstrie 9th Knight Of Lochow nació en 1199, en Lochawe, Argyll, Scotland, su papá, Gillecholum Ó Duibhne Campbell - First Lord of Lochowe, tenía 192 años y su mamá, Cambus Bellus Beauchamp Heiress of Beauchamp, tenía 178 años. Se casó con Errick MacDhonnchad en 1229, en Lochawe, Argyll, Scotland. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 3 hijas. Su ocupación registrada era lord of lochawe en Lochawe, Argyll, Scotland. Murió en 1280, en Menstrie, Clackmannanshire, Scotland, a la edad de 81 años, y fue sepultado en Kilchrenan, Argyll, Scotland.
